name: Clockwork Night
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>機</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>械</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>仕</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>掛</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>か</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>けの<ruby lang="jp"><rb>夜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>よる</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－クロック・ワーク・ナイト－
desc: All face-up monsters on the field become Machine monsters. Machine monsters you control gain 500 ATK/DEF, also Machine monsters your opponent controls lose 500 ATK/DEF. You can banish this card from your GY, then discard 1 card; add 1 EARTH Machine monster from your Deck to your hand. You can only use this effect of "Clockwork Night" once per turn. You can only activate 1 "Clockwork Night" per turn.

banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
